global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with an app interface mockup and promotional text.
global.main_message: Order dinner quickly with free delivery.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: App interface mockup
elements.description: A mockup of an app interface with two vertical rectangles representing windows and three circular buttons below them.

elements.label: Circular button
elements.description: A small circular button that appears below the app interface mockup, suggesting interactivity.

elements.label: Circular button
elements.description: Another small circular button positioned below the app interface mockup, similar in style to the previous button.

elements.label: Circular button
elements.description: A third small circular button located below the app interface mockup, maintaining the same design theme.

elements.label: Circular button
elements.description: A fourth small circular button positioned below the app interface mockup, consistent with the other buttons.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Dinner in minutes Free delivery over $15 €19.99' is prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Free delivery over $15 €19.99 Install now

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: The logo 'QuickFork' is presented in a bold font at the top left corner of the ad, contrasting against the blue background.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, app interface, promotional text
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the app interface is centered, and the promotional text is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: QuickFork, Dinner in minutes, Free delivery over $15, €19.99, Install now
